name: Key Lime Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake a pastry, graham crumb or cookie crumb pie crust.
2. Mix the sweetened condensed milk and egg yolks together until combined.
3. Add the key lime juice to the mixture. The mixture will thicken as you stir it all together.
4. Pour the filling into the baked pie shell.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes.
6. Cool, then chill in the refrigerator.
7. Top with whipped cream before serving.
